questions: What is the core idea of The Long and the Short of It?
How should brands balance long‑term brand building and short‑term activation?
qa.answer: Brand building creates long‑term growth via broad reach and memory structures; activation drives short‑term sales by harvesting existing demand. Optimal results come from balancing both according to category and context.
implication: Set budget split guardrails for brand vs. activation and revisit quarterly.
Use consistent brand assets and mass reach for long‑term effects.
Measure carryover and base sales in MMM; avoid over‑indexing on short‑term ROAS.
